steps.t: The road from Edoras to Aldburg sees much traffic, which makes it an attractive place for Orcs to attack. You should be wary as you journey to Aldburg…
The road from Edoras to Aldburg sees much traffic, which makes it an attractive place for Orcs to attack. You should be wary as you journey to Aldburg…
White Hand Orcs rush toward the overturned cart ready to attack. Defeat the White Hand attackers.
